title: Parthenon Roadmap
description: Execution project for the Parthenon v1.0.x stabilization arc and v2.0 runway.
readme:
# Parthenon Roadmap

## Objective
Track delivery of the Parthenon stabilization arc described in `ROADMAP.md`, from the March 30, 2026 foundation release through the May 11, 2026 release candidate.

## Current State
Parthenon v1.0.3 is the baseline release. The next six weeks are reserved for hardening, optimization, documentation, security validation, and release preparation.

## Release Philosophy
- Stabilization: v1.0.3 to v1.0.10
- Feature maturation: v1.1 to v1.x
- General availability: v2.0
- No net-new platform features are planned during the v1.0.x arc unless required to complete stabilization.

## Workflow
- Use the board view grouped by `Status` as the Kanban board.
- Use `Release` to filter work into weekly drops.
- Use `Category` and `Area` to break release work into manageable delivery tracks.
- Move items to `In Progress` only when implementation has started.
- Move items to `Done` only after code, validation, and documentation are complete.

## Definition Of Done
- Relevant code or configuration is merged.
- Tests or validation evidence exist for the change.
- User or developer documentation is updated when applicable.
- Release notes impact is understood for the target version.

## Release Map
- v1.0.3: Foundation release shipped March 30, 2026.
- v1.0.4: Test coverage and CI hardening target April 6, 2026.
- v1.0.5: Data quality and validation target April 13, 2026.
- v1.0.6: Performance optimization target April 20, 2026.
- v1.0.7: UX polish and accessibility target April 27, 2026.
- v1.0.8: Documentation and onboarding target May 1, 2026.
- v1.0.9: Security audit and hardening target May 4, 2026.
- v1.0.10: Release candidate target May 11, 2026.

items.title: v1.0.3 Foundation release baseline
items.body:
Track the March 30, 2026 public starting point for Parthenon. This item anchors the shipped baseline before stabilization work begins.

Scope:
- Confirm the v1.0.3 launch baseline is represented in release notes and project history.
- Treat all later stabilization work as deltas from this release.
- Preserve the shipped scope as the acceptance baseline for the v1.0.x arc.

items.title: v1.0.4 Test Coverage and CI Hardening release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.4 hardening release targeted for April 6, 2026.

Outcome:
- Close the largest automated test gaps.
- Harden CI gates so regressions are caught before deploy.
- Keep the release scoped to quality only.

items.title: v1.0.4 Backend test expansion
items.body:
Expand backend test coverage for the highest-risk service and integration areas.

Scope:
- Expand Pest coverage across all 56 service namespaces, prioritizing Achilles, DQD, Cohort, and Analysis services.
- Add integration tests for all 8 database connections and schema search paths.
- Test RBAC permission enforcement on each route group.
- Add contract tests for the R Plumber API and Python FastAPI service.

items.title: v1.0.4 Frontend unit and component testing
items.body:
Stand up frontend unit testing and cover the critical client-side state and workflow components.

Scope:
- Add Vitest and React Testing Library infrastructure.
- Cover critical Zustand stores.
- Add component tests for cohort builder, concept set editor, and analysis configuration.
- Add snapshot coverage for dark clinical theme consistency.

items.title: v1.0.4 End-to-end coverage expansion
items.body:
Deepen Playwright coverage across the full research workflow and specialized modules.

Scope:
- Cover login to cohort to analysis to results.
- Add GIS Explorer, imaging viewer, and genomics workflows.
- Validate Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit coverage.

items.title: v1.0.4 CI/CD hardening
items.body:
Strengthen automated quality gates and deployment safety.

Scope:
- Add ESLint and Vitest to pre-commit checks.
- Build a GitHub Actions sequence for lint, test, build, and deploy gating.
- Detect OpenAPI spec drift between generated types and live API responses.

items.title: v1.0.5 Data Quality and Validation release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.5 data integrity release targeted for April 13, 2026.

Outcome:
- Validate the correctness of characterization, vocabulary, ingestion, and schema behavior.
- Catch silent data integrity problems before performance work begins.

items.title: v1.0.5 Achilles and DQD validation
items.body:
Audit characterization and data quality behavior across all supported CDM sources.

Scope:
- Audit Achilles SQL template schema substitution.
- Validate DQD execution against OHDSI conformance benchmarks.
- Fix edge cases in per-source results schema routing.

items.title: v1.0.5 Vocabulary validation
items.body:
Verify vocabulary completeness and retrieval quality.

Scope:
- Validate Solr vocabulary index completeness against `vocab.concept`.
- Fix concept search ranking for synonyms and multi-word queries.
- Audit hierarchy traversal in concept set resolution.

items.title: v1.0.5 Ingestion and ETL validation
items.body:
Validate the ingestion pipeline from source profiling through CDM load.

Scope:
- Test WhiteRabbit scan through ETL mapping through CDM load end to end.
- Add checksums and row-count verification to ingestion jobs.
- Validate FHIR-to-CDM fidelity for Condition, MedicationRequest, and Observation resources.

items.title: v1.0.5 Database validation
items.body:
Audit migration safety and database integrity guardrails.

Scope:
- Audit all 210 migrations for idempotency and rollback safety.
- Validate foreign key behavior across schema boundaries.
- Add database CHECK constraints for OMOP CDM required fields.

items.title: v1.0.6 Performance Optimization release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.6 performance release targeted for April 20, 2026.

Outcome:
- Improve responsiveness for large OMOP workloads in API, UI, and infrastructure layers.
- Prioritize the slowest user-facing bottlenecks first.

items.title: v1.0.6 Backend performance optimization
items.body:
Profile and optimize the backend hotspots responsible for slow research workflows.

Scope:
- Optimize the top 20 slowest API endpoints.
- Add Redis caching for expensive vocabulary and ancestor queries.
- Remove N+1 patterns across CdmModel queries.
- Add indexes for Achilles joins and cohort inclusion queries.
- Tune Horizon concurrency for analysis execution jobs.

items.title: v1.0.6 Frontend performance optimization
items.body:
Improve rendering and interaction performance in the heaviest frontend modules.

Scope:
- Virtualize large data tables.
- Add skeleton states and optimistic updates across TanStack Query usage.
- Reduce unnecessary re-renders in the cohort builder and concept set editor.
- Lazy-load GIS, imaging, and genomics feature bundles.

items.title: v1.0.6 Infrastructure performance optimization
items.body:
Tune the platform infrastructure for large OMOP and analytics workloads.

Scope:
- Tune PostgreSQL memory and cache settings for OMOP usage.
- Optimize Solr analyzers, field types, and cache settings across configsets.
- Profile Docker resource allocation and enforce memory and CPU limits.
- Optimize the Vite production build for bundle size and compression.

items.title: v1.0.7 UX Polish and Accessibility release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.7 user experience release targeted for April 27, 2026.

Outcome:
- Standardize research workflows and navigation patterns.
- Reach WCAG 2.1 AA across the product surface.
- Improve usability on tablet and large-screen research setups.

items.title: v1.0.7 Navigation and layout standardization
items.body:
Make navigation and page-level interaction patterns consistent across all modules.

Scope:
- Audit and standardize navigation patterns across 39 feature modules.
- Ensure consistent breadcrumbs, titles, and back-navigation.
- Standardize empty states, error boundaries, and loading indicators.
- Group sidebar modules by research phase for discoverability.

items.title: v1.0.7 Clinical workflow polish
items.body:
Tighten the highest-value research interactions so users can move through studies with less friction.

Scope:
- Streamline cohort definition through results workflows.
- Add contextual help and inline documentation links.
- Improve concept set drag-and-drop behavior.
- Polish Abby chat history, suggestions, and inline result presentation.

items.title: v1.0.7 Accessibility audit and remediation
items.body:
Close accessibility gaps across the application surface.

Scope:
- Run a WCAG 2.1 AA audit across all modules.
- Add keyboard navigation for core interactive workflows.
- Improve screen reader support for data tables, charts, and the OHIF viewer.
- Validate dark theme color contrast.

items.title: v1.0.7 Responsive workspace audit
items.body:
Make research workspace layouts work cleanly across tablet and large-screen breakpoints.

Scope:
- Audit tablet and large-screen layouts.
- Ensure modals, drawers, and panels scale appropriately.

items.title: v1.0.8 Documentation and Onboarding release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.8 docs release targeted for May 1, 2026.

Outcome:
- Make the platform teachable for new users and maintainable for contributors.
- Improve product onboarding and contextual guidance.

items.title: v1.0.8 User manual completion
items.body:
Finish end-user documentation for core workflows and onboarding.

Scope:
- Complete all 14 user manual parts with screenshots, walkthroughs, and clinical examples.
- Add a 5-minute first cohort quickstart using Eunomia.
- Document Abby capabilities with example prompts.
- Add tutorial-ready walkthroughs for the top 10 research workflows.

items.title: v1.0.8 Developer documentation completion
items.body:
Round out the material needed to understand, operate, and extend the platform.

Scope:
- Publish API reference from the OpenAPI spec with examples.
- Write the architecture guide covering schema design, service patterns, and Docker topology.
- Add a contributor guide with setup, testing, and PR workflow.
- Document all Artisan commands and their use cases.

items.title: v1.0.8 In-app help and onboarding improvements
items.body:
Improve product-native guidance for first-time and intermittent users.

Scope:
- Expand contextual help per feature.
- Improve the SetupWizard flow for super-admin onboarding.
- Add guided tours for cohort building, vocabulary exploration, and analysis setup.

items.title: v1.0.9 Security Audit and Hardening release
items.body:
Coordinate the v1.0.9 security release targeted for May 4, 2026.

Outcome:
- Validate the existing HIGHSEC model end to end.
- Produce evidence suitable for external review and compliance documentation.

items.title: v1.0.9 Authentication and authorization audit
items.body:
Verify that authentication, authorization, and ownership checks are enforced across the API surface.

Scope:
- Pen-test all API controllers for auth bypass, privilege escalation, and IDOR.
- Validate Sanctum token lifecycle behavior.
- Audit every route in `api.php` against the auth, permission, and ownership model.
- Confirm RBAC role hierarchy boundaries.

items.title: v1.0.9 Data protection audit
items.body:
Validate data protection controls and read-only enforcement around sensitive data paths.

Scope:
- Confirm no unauthenticated route exposes PHI, PII, or clinical data.
- Audit Abby interrogation connection read-only behavior.
- Review shared cohort link token quality and time bounds.
- Validate CdmModel read-only enforcement on clinical tables.

items.title: v1.0.9 Infrastructure security audit
items.body:
Validate infrastructure-level protections across the deployed stack.

Scope:
- Verify all Docker containers run as non-root.
- Audit secret file permissions.
- Enforce authentication for Redis, Orthanc, and Grafana.
- Scan Docker images for known CVEs.
- Review network segmentation between containers.

items.title: v1.0.9 Compliance evidence package
items.body:
Turn security hardening work into reviewable evidence.

Scope:
- Document HIPAA technical safeguards implemented in Parthenon.
- Generate a security controls matrix mapping HIGHSEC rules to implementation evidence.
- Prepare artifacts for third-party security review.

items.title: v1.0.10 Release Candidate
items.body:
Coordinate the final stabilization release candidate targeted for May 11, 2026.

Outcome:
- Consolidate everything validated during v1.0.x into a polished release candidate.
- Confirm the platform is ready for the next phase of feature maturation and cloud readiness.

items.title: v1.0.10 Final stabilization sweep and release readiness
items.body:
Close the v1.0.x arc with a final release readiness sweep.

Scope:
- Verify that all accepted stabilization work is complete or explicitly deferred.
- Re-run critical quality, performance, documentation, and security validation.
- Prepare release notes, acceptance checklist, and handoff into v1.1 planning.

items.title: v1.1+ Feature maturation planning
items.body:
Capture the post-stabilization runway without mixing it into the v1.0.x quality sprint.

Scope:
- Keep federation, integrations, and new capabilities out of the stabilization arc unless required.
- Use this as the placeholder for v1.1 and later planning once the release candidate is complete.
